display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: When Gerry and Simon get student teachers, Gerry's hands-off approach fails; Bobbi starts taking supplements; Emma's characters bear a resemblance to some of the staff.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma tries to set Janet up with their new mason; Jung and Appa struggle to cope with a simple, kind gesture; Kimchee and Shannon can't get on the same page for employee evaluations.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Janet take a first aid course; Umma worries that her prayers may be backfiring; Shannon and Jung are finalists for a reality TV show.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Things start looking up when Louis gets a billboard for the restaurant in an ideal location, but repeated vandalism causes problems; Eddie tries to get a girl's attention.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Greg and Katie disagree about Taylor going to a Halloween party; Oliver and Cooper anxiously prepare for a game of "seven minutes in heaven" with their dates; a pregnant Viv follows Katie around trying to get help preparing for her baby's arrival.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: An upcoming high-school reunion presents unique opportunities for Helen, Lowell and Brian.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: While Joe awaits the results of a paternity test, Helen gets ready to celebrate a romantic Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A reporter publishes politically incorrect comments made by Becker during an argument.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker finds himself suffering from writer's block and desperately searches for quiet space to compose.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Tricks seem to overrule treats on Halloween when a rowdy group of Marines ends up as patients. Guest starring George Wendt and Andrew Dice Clay.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Charles set out to test the crew's gullibility when they announce that Marilyn Monroe is due to arrive.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: As Halloween draws near, Calvin tries to determine what's behind the sudden strange occurrences at the Butlers' house; Gemma and Tina question if their days of sexy costumes should be behind them.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin is thrilled when he unexpectedly crosses paths with NFL legend Jerome "The Bus" Bettis; he discovers the hall of fame football player shares a history with Tina; Dave deals with the fallout of a romantic revelation.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff discovers that a female colleague wants to have an affair with him; Russell tries to retrieve his phone from an apartment after a one-night stand.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: To make Audrey happy, Jeff begrudgingly agrees to see a couple's therapist; Russell develops a crush on Timmy's fiancé.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Things start looking up when Louis gets a billboard for the restaurant in an ideal location, but repeated vandalism causes problems; Eddie tries to get a girl's attention.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Greg and Katie disagree about Taylor going to a Halloween party; Oliver and Cooper anxiously prepare for a game of "seven minutes in heaven" with their dates; a pregnant Viv follows Katie around trying to get help preparing for her baby's arrival.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: As everyone prepares for the premiere of the documentary, Jim convinces Dwight that he needs to hire an assistant to the assistant to the regional manager; after being turned away at daycare, Angela brings her baby to work.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: On the way to the Grey Cup, Brent considers his real feelings for Lacey.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey try to figure out their relationship; Emma's on the warpath.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent finds out his parents never married; Lacey's mission to help Oscar.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis regains sense of smell; Brent realizes how little he knows about his friends.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan avoids coping with a death in the family, only to be confronted by it head-on; Ben and Darlene address Ben's baby fever; Dwight gets the jitters when he has to fill in for the chef who suffers an accident.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon dismantles the refrigerator to stop it from humming; he gets a paper route to pay for its repair.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes jealous when Dr. Sturgis bonds with Paige, another ten-year-old genius; Mary invites Paige's family over for a playdate.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary's faith is shaken by a tragedy in the community, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When George Sr. asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hide out at Tam's for his first sleepover.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's routine is turned upside down when his barber gets sick; Wolowitz questions his decision to go into space.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon chooses to participate in a guys-only weekend Star Wars gaming marathon rather than go with Amy to her aunt's birthday party; he gets a lesson from Penny and Amy.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon "Star Trek" collectibles, Sheldon finds himself haunted by Mr. Spock; after a blind date, Raj believes he has met his future wife.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan avoids coping with a death in the family, only to be confronted by it head-on; Ben and Darlene address Ben's baby fever; Dwight gets the jitters when he has to fill in for the chef who suffers an accident.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan starts to bond with his younger half brother, but he can't get over the fact that their father paid for Ed Jr.'s college education, something he refused to do for Dan; Jackie hits it off with a fun married couple.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Dr. Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins; Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher Mr. Lundy over plans for a Halloween haunted house fundraiser for the church; Georgie falls for a rebellious teenage girl whom Sheldon is tutoring.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon gets into trouble with fellow child genius Paige at the science museum; George Sr. is forced to play therapist to Paige's bickering parents; Mary, Georgie and Missy help Meemaw with a garage sale.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Joey Moves Out: After having a fight with Chandler, Joey moves out. Monica's father finds out that his best friend (Tom Selleck) and Monica are dating. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Eddie Moves In: Joey considers moving back in with Chandler, but Chandler has a new roommate. A record producer wants to make a music video for Phoebe's song, "Smelly Cat". (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ramoray Dies: Joey's soap opera character gets dropped down an elevator shaft after Joey brags of writing his own lines in an interview. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Eddie Won't Go: Chandler demands that his bizarre new roommate, Eddie, moves out, but he doesn't seem to get the message. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Old Yeller Dies: Phoebe's world view is shattered when she learns how "Old Yeller" really ends. Monica becomes jealous when Richard starts hanging with Joey and Chandler. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Ross run into two bullies at the coffee shop, one of whom steals Chandler's hat. Meanwhile, Phoebe meets a brother she never knew she had. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Complications ensue when Rachel's estranged parents show up at the surprise party that the gang planned for her. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Chicken Pox: Phoebe catches chicken pox from the baby just as her navy boyfriend (special guest-star Charlie Sheen) surfaces for the first time in two years. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Barry & Mindy's Wedding: Rachel agrees to be maid of honour at her ex-fiancé's wedding. Monica ponders her future with Richard after he tells her he doesn't want children. (S2, E.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: Live & Laughing
programme.desc: 'Live & Laughing' is the first show of McIntyre's sell out run at the Apollo. He looks at learning to drive, the trouble of bringing up children, and the world of the "Man Drawer".

programme.title: Kerry Godliman: Bandwidth
programme.desc: Kerry Godliman blends rage and chaotic hilarity in her brilliant brand-new special recorded live at London's Comedy Store, as she struggles to maintain the bandwidth for middle-aged modern life.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? (USA)
programme.desc: In 'Let's Make a Date', bachelorette Jeff chooses between Wayne's horny werewolf & Colin's useless superhero 'Tongue Man'. Guest star Candice Patton joins for a deep-sea 'Living Scenery'. (S4, E.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? (USA)
programme.desc: Wayne plays Bigfoot in a snowy edition of 'Hollywood Director', discover some tasks you shouldn't do in the nude and there's a musical tribute to ex-NSYNC member & special guest Joey Fatone. (S4, E.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Inspired..
programme.desc: ...Unemployed. This final episode of the series decides who will face The Ultimate Punishment, a bespoke challenge that leans into the loser's fears. (S1, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra shares Ray's "choo choo gone" dream with the girls, and Amy tells Robert. The guys make fun of Ray for dreaming about a train and he tells them that it was about a girl. (S8, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A young man, Sam, arrives at Frank's house and everyone is surprised when they fondly embrace. He explains Frank had been like a mentor to him. His sons scoff. (S8, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A young man, Sam, arrives at Frank's house and everyone is surprised when they fondly embrace. He explains Frank had been like a mentor to him. His sons scoff. (S8, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to guilt Robert and Ray into helping her with a shelf project. The brothers band together to resist her, and go to get a prime spot on a golf course. Season finale. (S8, E.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Michael introduces a performance by Katherine Jenkins. Former footballer Robbie Savage hands over his mobile phone, and an unsuspecting florist is given her moment in the spotlight. (S1, E.

programme.title: The Upper Hand
programme.desc: Charlie finds himself in the way when Caroline's adventurer husband returns from the jungle. (S1, E.

programme.title: The Upper Hand
programme.desc: The romantic bliss between Caroline and Michael is wearing thin, and although Charlie's new job is perfect, something is missing. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where The Monkey Gets Away: The gang search for Ross' monkey, Marcel, who slipped out of the apartment while Rachel was looking after him. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Evil Orthodontist: Rachel and Barry start dating again, even though he is engaged to Mindy. Mindy then asks Rachel to be her maid of honour which adds to her guilt. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Monica's credit card is stolen, she and the girls decide to try and catch the thief. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Ick Factor: After losing his virginity to her, Monica's boyfriend reveals that he's a high school senior. Meanwhile, Phoebe temps as Chandler's secretary. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends: Guide To Cooking
programme.desc: Ross gets unusually upset when someone at work takes his sandwich from the refrigerator and eats it. (S5, E.

programme.title: Friends: Guide To Cooking
programme.desc: The One With All The Cheesecakes: Chandler and Rachel can't help eating the irresistible cheesecakes that are meant for a neighbour. (S7, E.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Ron has another encounter with Tammy 2 (Megan Mullally); Leslie makes a big decision about the future.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael tries to combat his growing debt by asking employees for loans; Jim and Pam spend a night at Dwight's family farm.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael tries to combat his growing debt by asking employees for loans; Jim and Pam spend a night at Dwight's family farm.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael fights back when Karen tries to woo Stanley away from Scranton; a Finer Things Club further disturbs Dunder Mifflin's calm.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: When Ryan excludes him from a wilderness retreat, Michael goes into the woods for his own survival adventure; Jim tries to revolutionize the office birthday party.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Jan sues Dunder Mifflin, and Michael is deposed as a witness; Kelly trash-talks Pam after Darryl beats Jim at ping-pong.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Pam and Jim run out of excuses and must go to Jan and Michael's house for dinner; when Dwight learns that Angela and Andy are also invited, jealousy gets the best of him.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A model in an office-supply catalog makes Michael feel things; to win back Dunder-Mifflin's parking spaces, Kevin and Andy oppose bosses of five businesses.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight decide to surprise Ryan in New York; Scranton staffers must work on a Saturday for Ryan's Website project.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael tries to give Stanley an attitude adjustment after Stanley snaps at him; Dwight decides to buy Andy's car; after spending the night at Jim's, Pam deals with an unexpected inconvenience.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Jim hits the golf course with Andy and Kevin in hope of landing a huge client; Michael sets up a booth at a job fair at Pam's alma mater to hire a summer intern.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael demands Toby's goodbye party at Dunder Mifflin be a huge celebration; Dwight and Meredith haze Holly (Amy Ryan), the new human resources person.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael demands Toby's goodbye party at Dunder Mifflin be a huge celebration; Dwight and Meredith haze Holly (Amy Ryan), the new human resources person.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Staffers in the Scranton branch of Dunder Mifflin become obsessed with their weight in the wake of corporate weight-loss initiatives; Michael pursues a friendship with Holly; Jim misses Pam, who is away at art school.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Staffers in the Scranton branch of Dunder Mifflin become obsessed with their weight in the wake of corporate weight-loss initiatives; Michael pursues a friendship with Holly; Jim misses Pam, who is away at art school.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A business ethics seminar gets out of control when Michael lets everyone talk about their unethical behavior at work; Jim makes Dwight observe the company's "time theft" policy.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael has Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios to prepare for the birth of Jan's baby; Michael tells Holly he will pretend not to like her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part-time job so she can afford art school; Michael and Holly get an early start on their date night; after the office is robbed, Michael decides to raise money for all the lost items.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A down-and-out artist gets a commission for a series of "still deaths" from an unusual dealer. Starring Tim Roth.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: The Big Bad Wolf eats two foolish pigs and frames the third. Animated.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A beautiful thief (Brooke Shields) falls for a rich man (Perry King).

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Revenge is in store when an idyllic affair between a photographer and his model is ruined by another suitor.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A prostitute (Lea Thompson) learns the cost of going straight.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: The ultimate strong-man event in Las Vegas pits the fighters' wives against one another. With Wayne Newton, Mark Dacascos, Stoney Jackson, Marjean Holden and Debbe Dunning.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A clown plots to murder his wife's psychic lover; with Ernie Hudson, Joan Chen.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: The leader of a fraternity pledge discovers tactics even more vicious than his own. With Kevin Dillon and Wil Wheaton.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A businessman kills a friend; with Clancy Brown, Cheech Marin.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A husband hires a hit man; with Hector Elizondo, Sam Waterston, Patsy Kensit; director Kyle MacLachlan.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman (Demi Moore) marries on a seer's advice; with Jeffrey Tambor.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A con man (Joe Pesci) must make good on a promise to marry twin sisters. With Kristen Amber and Burt Young.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Two medical researchers (Cleavon Little, Sonia Braga) learn that their unscrupulous supervisor can't take a joke.

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: A fire inspector feels guilty after taking a bribe from a club owner. With Esai Morales, Terry O'Quinn, Kimberly Williams and Benicio del Toro.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 disrupts the space-time continuum, civilian Carter and Daniel must set things right.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Mitchell, Jackson, Teal'c and Vala set out on a mission to uncover a stash of ancient riches.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel Jackson and Vala are transported to a distant galaxy populated by worshipers of a strange authority.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel and Vala inadvertently expose Earth to a new threat.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel and Vala embark on a series of missions in their quest to unlock the device that has bound them together.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When the Serpent Brotherhood wants to kill Santa, the librarians must rescue him and help him accomplish the secret purpose of Christmas.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When the dragons sleeping beneath the earth threaten to awaken and wreak havoc around the world, Flynn returns to help find their hidden treasure.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: After a brutal attack in the woods, Nick and Hank discover a Wesen disease that could be the inspiration behind the werewolf myth; Adalind may be able to get back what she wants through an alliance.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick suspect Wesen of being involved in the death of a young woman who seems to have aged 70 years overnight; the duo turns to Rosalee for help in the investigation.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A preacher uses his Wesen identity to gain believers who are hellbent on protecting him; Capt. Renard continues his pursuit of power in local government; Eve gains access to Black Claw.

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Budding entrepreneurs get three minutes to pitch their business ideas to five multimillionaires who are willing to invest their own cash to kick-start the businesses in the original "Shark Tank." After each pitch, the Dragons have the opportunity to ask questions about the venture. The entrepreneurs don't always have to answer, but of course what they choose not to address could very well affect t

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rivals try to avoid a one-way ticket to elimination.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Learning why an important urban center is sinking toward oblivion; soaring over sprawling ruins buried under Saharan sands; learning the modern secret of an ancient fortress; eyeing a ghost town on the edge of the Gobi.

programme.title: Secrets in the Sand
programme.desc: Exploring an ancient Egyptian cemetery filled with everyday people and find links to historic weaponry in a horseshoe-shaped French monument; puzzle over a lost South Asian society, then see if human remains found in Wales hint at coastal rituals.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: A holiday cruise ship sails into a hurricane, terrifying 4,000 passengers as their cabins are plunged underwater.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.desc: Navigating an Arizona border town where soldiers fought between two worlds; seeing a revolutionary mountain hideaway in New York; touring an American icon's dilapidated birthplace; viewing an Alaskan monument to natural-resource exploitation.

programme.title: Secrets in the Sand
programme.desc: Experts uncover four global stories of extraordinary curiosities that were once concealed in the deserts of the planet.

programme.title: Prime Suspect: Earth
programme.desc: A trio makes a daring escape from "the Rock"; a U.S. representative's plane vanishes in Alaska; a giant spiral in the sky stuns Norway.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.desc: Navigating an Arizona border town where soldiers fought between two worlds; seeing a revolutionary mountain hideaway in New York; touring an American icon's dilapidated birthplace; viewing an Alaskan monument to natural-resource exploitation.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Martin Freeman and Erin Doherty join Graham on his sofa; with music from singer-songwriter Olivia Dean.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accuses Maxwell of not spending enough time with his children when they get head lice, but he is spared.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Jackie's apartment is uninhabitable so she spends a few days at the Conners'; an unexpected visit from Roseanne's parents creates havoc.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: A tough, nit-picking new supervisor at the factory makes life unbearable for all the employees, including a fed-up Roseanne; pushed to her limit, Roseanne cuts a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Becky suffers major public embarrassment at school, when she passes gas during a presentation before her fellow students; Roseanne and Dan make an ill-fated attempt to console Becky after she is humiliated at school.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne refuses to support Jackie when she decides to become a police officer and announces she's going to the police academy; this rekindles an old sibling rivalry that leads to an all out wrestling match in the Conner living room.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: When a major earthquake shakes Los Angeles, George's repressed childhood fears resurface. Despite a positive assessment of the house from a contractor, George refuses to go back in, and he and Carmen set up a tent in the backyard.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: When Benny demands cash for a box of George's childhood mementos, George learns some painful truths about his boyhood.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Wedding singers (Robert Rodriguez and Chingon, and William Hung) audition when George comes up with a plan for Angie's dream wedding.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George invites Carmen's boyfriend to move in with the family when he realizes the boy's father is a little too tough on him.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Al gets more women than he can handle when an aerobics studio opens next door.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Buck passes away, leaving a heartbroken Kelly to find a new pet.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Al forms a church with his beer-drinking buddies as a means to avoid paying taxes.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Much to Al's horror, his new baldness remedy also turns out to be a love potion.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: After Peg rescues him from a mugger, Al stages a robbery in hopes of saving his pride.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: In order to join a men's club, Bud attempts to get a wrestler's (King Kong Bundy) autograph and ends up in the ring.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie's plan to stay at a hotel while visiting Florida backfires when the hotel is overrun by spring breakers.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Arthur embarrasses Carrie at a job interview, Doug must heal the breach between father and daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug sabotages Carrie's efforts to socialize with her co-workers by doing crass things, such as showing them his chest hair. Amy Stiller guest stars.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp: The Movie
programme.desc: Jet and his friends take their skills to Space Camp and experience an intergalactic adventure.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Boy
programme.desc: When Scott and Teresa learn that their son, Austin, is autistic and has brittle bone disease, they initially worry about his future. However, with Scott's growing faith and Austin's incredible spirit, they become unbreakable as they find joy, gratitude and courage in the most trying times.

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Agent 007 blasts into orbit in this action-packed adventure that takes him to Venice, Rio de Janeiro and outer space. When Bond investigates the hijacking of an American space shuttle, he and beautiful CIA agent Holly Goodhead are soon locked in a life-or-death struggle against Hugo Drax, a power-mad industrialist whose horrific scheme may destroy all human life on Earth!

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th President of the United States.

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Teenager Josh (Kevin Zegers) just became the legal owner of his basketball-playing dog, Buddy. But now Buddy is playing football, too, thanks to veterinarian Patrick Sullivan (Gregory Harrison), who happens to be the new boyfriend of Josh's mom. Unfortunately, Josh and Patrick don't get along too well. But, when a couple of Russians (Nora Dunn, Perry Anzilotti) see Buddy playing on TV and decide t

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Sleuth Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) and Detective Lynwood (Barclay Hope) investigate a decades-old case involving the disappearance of a groom.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th President of the United States.

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Teenager Josh (Kevin Zegers) just became the legal owner of his basketball-playing dog, Buddy. But now Buddy is playing football, too, thanks to veterinarian Patrick Sullivan (Gregory Harrison), who happens to be the new boyfriend of Josh's mom. Unfortunately, Josh and Patrick don't get along too well. But, when a couple of Russians (Nora Dunn, Perry Anzilotti) see Buddy playing on TV and decide t

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Sleuth Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) and Detective Lynwood (Barclay Hope) investigate a decades-old case involving the disappearance of a groom.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Antiques guru Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) investigates a murder after an old college friend becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp: The Movie
programme.desc: Jet and his friends take their skills to Space Camp and experience an intergalactic adventure.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Boy
programme.desc: When Scott and Teresa learn that their son, Austin, is autistic and has brittle bone disease, they initially worry about his future. However, with Scott's growing faith and Austin's incredible spirit, they become unbreakable as they find joy, gratitude and courage in the most trying times.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Logan's widow starts a chain reaction campaign to kill people from her husband's captor's families.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a woman welcomes a young family when they move into the long-derelict house next door, then escalating fights over pets and children lead to a deadly confrontation.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Logan's widow starts a chain reaction campaign to kill people from her husband's captor's families.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: Todd Kendhammer claims his wife was killed in a car accident; the forensic evidence doesn't back him up; when a new defense team, known for working on the Steve Avery case is hired, they bring in their own forensic experts who contradict the case.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officers Nolan and Bradford hope they can de-escalate a drug war before any innocent lives are lost; Officer Harper hopes she can get Officer Chen ready to go undercover.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Nolan mildly injures himself while chasing down a shoplifter and the local district attorney wants to charge the suspect with assault, despite Nolan's wishes; Lucy goes undercover; Lopez's wedding venue is seized by the FBI.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Nolan and the entire team race against the clock to locate Lopez after she is kidnapped on her wedding day, not only to save her life but her unborn child's.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Nolan and Officer Chen's run-in with an infamous thief tips them off to a potentially big heist surrounding the Getty's big gala event; Nolan works up the courage to ask Bailey out on a date.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officers Nolan and Chen report to a structure fire and suspect that there is more to the situation than meets the eye; after a sniper shooting, the team searches for the shooter and discovers that the perpetrator has a connection to one of its own.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Nolan and Officer Chen search for a missing person who may have international ties, putting everyone's lives in danger; Harper continues the search for a serial arsonist; Wesley must overcome an impossible task.

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Actor Sam Worthington.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon is required to attend Sunday school, but when he returns he decides to learn all he can about a multitude of religions.

programme.desc: Deke tells Remy he's not ready to give him another chance; Will faces the consequences of hiding the truth from Electra; Brooke's anguish over Hope's betrayal leads to a dramatic breaking point.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene urges Ben to make some male friends as he feels anxious about turning 50; Mark asks Harris to buy him and his friends beer for their dorm room.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The hardware store experiences a smash-and-grab; Dan and Jackie nab one of the culprits; Beverly Rose learns a lesson in remembering loved ones who have passed while keeping their memories alive.

programme.title: The Social
programme.desc: Daytime talk series "The Social" brings a fresh perspective on the latest news, pop-culture topics and lifestyle subjects. Co-hosted by Melissa Grelo, Cynthia Loyst, Lainey Lui, and Traci Melchor, "The Social" offers a completely new format featuring ways for viewers to be socially interactive through comments and feedback on Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, and other social networks. programme.desc: Karen's reputation as a woman of the law is marred when an accidental muffin incident causes chaos for the team.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team must escape from a prison built to simulate the fires of hell. Stars Richard Dean Anderson, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping and Christopher Judge.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters an entire world suffering from amnesia. Stars Richard Dean Anderson.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Samantha (Amanda Tapping) must access her memories of Jolinar to save her father. With Richard Dean Anderson, Michael Shanks and Christopher Judge.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel Jackson's reunion with Sha're leads to painful consequences.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters an entire world suffering from amnesia. Stars Richard Dean Anderson.

programme.title: Killjoys
programme.desc: Dutch enters the deadly Supermax prison and fights his way to the top as he seeks a chance to take over the entire ship.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Investigation into the death of an armored-car driver leads Beckett and Castle to one of Esposito's old cases.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix tells the ship's children a ghost story about an electromagnetic life force that holds Voyager hostage while trying to make contact with Janeway.

programme.title: Orphan Black
programme.desc: Sarah reconsiders revenge when Kira is threatened; Cosima faces the truth about Delphine; Sarah must decide the killer's fate.

programme.title: Orphan Black
programme.desc: Sarah's attempt at convincing the enemy is obstructed by Art's intervention; the Orphans must decide whether or not to make peace with their creators; Sarah confronts the enemy.

programme.title: Live: ARC Las Vegas
programme.desc: ARC Las Vegas is the home for Authentic Relevant Community news; Evan Schreiber and Chloe Coast bring the conversation on the stories that matter most in Southern Nevada.

programme.title: Live: ARC Las Vegas
programme.desc: ARC Las Vegas is the home for Authentic Relevant Community news; Evan Schreiber and Chloe Coast bring the conversation on the stories that matter most in Southern Nevada.

programme.title: Sherri
programme.desc: Fashion designer Isaac Mizrahi talks with Sherri about the 10th anniversary of his shows at the Café Carlyle; "The Real Housewives of Potomac" star Charrisse Jackson-Jordan.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon's risky affair with a patient turns deadly.

programme.title: iCRIME With Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Crimes from across the country that have been captured by ordinary people on their smartphones; stories of victims, witnesses, law enforcement and the videographers themselves.

programme.title: iCRIME With Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Crimes from across the country that have been captured by ordinary people on their smartphones; stories of victims, witnesses, law enforcement and the videographers themselves.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Babysitter Brianna left a child unattended for more than an hour before finding her lifeless in the backyard pool; Shazella's daughter suffered several injuries throughout her life, and Shazella has been the prime suspect each time.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Rick says he denies girlfriend Jovia's daughter because of Jovia's use of an online dating site, plus he thinks he is unable to make girls; Savannah fears that her ex-boyfriend is a con artist; Roy suspects Jamie is cheating with a family member.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Carrie thinks her husband, Randy, cheated and even admits she once cheated out of spite; after raising Kalicia and then losing her, Buck is desperate to know if he is her father.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Actress Tamera Mowry-Housley ("Baked With Love: Holiday"); singer-songwriter Raye chats and performs.

programme.title: Scrambled Up
programme.desc: The key to "Scrambled Up" is its simple, fast and fun format. Four players compete to be the first to correctly unscramble word puzzles. Colorful tiles slowly rearrange themselves while players are given clues to the answer. Host Michael Yo.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A woman entrusts $6,800 with a close friend who promises to purchase a car for her at an auction; when a car never shows up, she goes after her friend for payback.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Babysitter Brianna left a child unattended for more than an hour before finding her lifeless in the backyard pool; Shazella's daughter suffered several injuries throughout her life, and Shazella has been the prime suspect each time.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Carrie thinks her husband, Randy, cheated and even admits she once cheated out of spite; after raising Kalicia and then losing her, Buck is desperate to know if he is her father.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A couple reunites after 30 years only to be torn apart over personal loans after an ex-girlfriend comes back into the picture; both parties sue for the 10 thousand court maximum when the cost of a wolfdog and alleged loss of income fall into dispute.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: After an apartment fire made her homeless, a woman sues a former friend who offered her a place to stay, for a wrongful eviction and unwanted sexual advances while staying with him; he countersues for damages due to false accusations.

programme.title: PIX11 News at 4
programme.desc: Staying informed with the news and headlines.

programme.title: PIX11 News at 5
programme.desc: Staying informed with the news and headlines.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Truist Park in Atlanta.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The baking bikers start their epic 5,000-mile bakeation on Norway's stunning west coast, meeting some artisan bakers and sampling some brown cheese and aquavit.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick's journey begins in Dieppe with turbot straight off the boats, followed by a forage for sea herbs along the Bay of the Somme.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein's journey takes him through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura, home to his favourite French dish, choucroute garni, and favourite French cheese, comte.

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob are on the mighty River Severn and fishing for one of the UK's lesser-known species - the zander - when This Country star Charlie Cooper visits them bankside.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell return with more unseen material from guests including Charlie Brooker, Johnny Marr, Shazia Mirza and Craig Charles.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Gloria Hunniford, Guz Khan, Christopher Eccleston and Sophie Willan, but are they telling the truth or making it all up.

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig's guests - Nabil Abdulrashid, Bill Bailey, Victoria Coren Mitchell and Alan Davies - are all in it together for this united episode.

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Jack Dee hosts as journalist Janet Street-Porter and comedian Phil Wang join team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to look back on Boris Johnson's time as Prime Minister.

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Mockers Chris Addison, Hugh Dennis and Andy Hamilton find plenty to ridicule in the week's news with the help of Gary Delaney, Miles Jupp and Nathan Caton. Dara O Briain hosts.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Nadine Coyle, Spencer Matthews, Vogue Williams, Kerry Godliman and Phil Wang join host Jimmy Carr and team captains Rob Beckett and Katherine Ryan.

programme.title: Saving Hope
programme.desc: Struggling to get her life back to normal, Alex finds inspiration from an immigrant doctor.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Ian, a pathological liar, comes to Ray and Fraser for help in finding his girlfriend, who has allegedly been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy exhibits bizarre behavior during a family reunion when she eats some Orkan food.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork disguises himself as an elderly woman to turn the tables on a gang of punks who mugged Mindy's grandmother.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: New York Mayor Randall Winston needs help running the city. So, for much of the series, he counts on Deputy Mayor Mike Flaherty to help him. Flaherty, usually a man who is calm and organized, can "spin" out of control when it comes to his personal life, the ditzy mayor, and his abnormal co-workers. For the show's final two seasons, Flaherty is replaced as deputy mayor by Charlie Crawford after Mic

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: Michael (Michael J. Fox) has difficulty living up to his new moniker -- "Sexiest Man in New York." With Barry Bostwick and Carla Gugino.

programme.title: Dave's World
programme.desc: The newspaper is deluged by angry mail when Dave writes an uncomplimentary column about car salesmen.

programme.title: Dave's World
programme.desc: Dave (Harry Anderson) disapproves when Shel (Meshach Taylor) suddenly decides to sell his house, buy a boat and sail the Caribbean. With Zane Carney.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Alex breaks off her relationship with Brian after he and a friend go too far with their late-night drinking.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Helen prepares for the worst when Davis (Mark Harelik) makes an unplanned midweek visit; dumped Brian asks Ray Charles to serenade Alex.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff is in heaven when both Carla and Diane accept a date with him for the Postman's Ball.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's matchmaking skills shine when Frasier announces plans to marry the girl Sam picked out for him.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: New York Mayor Randall Winston needs help running the city. So, for much of the series, he counts on Deputy Mayor Mike Flaherty to help him. Flaherty, usually a man who is calm and organized, can "spin" out of control when it comes to his personal life, the ditzy mayor, and his abnormal co-workers. For the show's final two seasons, Flaherty is replaced as deputy mayor by Charlie Crawford after Mic

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: Michael (Michael J. Fox) has difficulty living up to his new moniker -- "Sexiest Man in New York." With Barry Bostwick and Carla Gugino.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: Stuart (Alan Ruck) takes charge while Michael and Mayor Winston (Michael J. Fox, Barry Bostwick) try to settle the garbage strike. With Carla Gugino.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: Michael allows a TV crew to shoot a profile on him, but a wayward remark gets him in trouble with Ashley.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Alex breaks off her relationship with Brian after he and a friend go too far with their late-night drinking.

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys face a swamp nightmare in Georgia. They must find an ingenious way to reclaim the Buchannans' land from a snake and gator-infested swamp.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: A Well That Takes On Water. The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Opal Whispers are forced to leave behind a rich opal seam in a mine on the verge of collapse. The Cheals are cut off from their mine by crippling floods.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Battered by the ice pack, Sig changes tactics deploying an experimental bait from Norway. On the Time Bandit, frustration boils over as Freddy tests Johnathan.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: With intense currents holding back the Arctic ice pack, Keith struggles to retrieve his catch. Jake and Sean face losing everything when ice swallows their gear.

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The Yorkshire Air Ambulance fly to assist once again. The team attempt to rescue a biker who has been catapulted 30 metres into a road sign.

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia
programme.desc: A shocking machete attack on a puppy leaves the medical team fighting to save his life. The Animal Cops embark on the hunt for his attacker.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew are desperate to find fine gold to fund their expensive operation. Rookie team Jacqui and Andrew find gold nuggets in Queensland.

programme.title: Live: Stimulation for Dogs
programme.desc: Engaging programs designed to stimulate dogs mentally, crafted to ignite your dog's interest, and enhance their playful spirit.

programme.title: Live: Stimulation for Dogs
programme.desc: Engaging programs designed to stimulate dogs mentally, crafted to ignite your dog's interest, and enhance their playful spirit.

programme.title: Live: Exposure for Dogs
programme.desc: Programs edited with limited exposure to sounds that help your dog get accustomed to things like car rides and doorbells.

programme.title: Live: Relaxation For Dogs
programme.desc: How to reduce a dog's stress, and help them relax through music and images.

programme.title: Live: Relaxation For Dogs
programme.desc: How to reduce a dog's stress, and help them relax through music and images.

programme.title: Live: Stimulation for Dogs
programme.desc: Engaging programs designed to stimulate dogs mentally, crafted to ignite your dog's interest, and enhance their playful spirit.

programme.title: Live: Stimulation for Dogs
programme.desc: Engaging programs designed to stimulate dogs mentally, crafted to ignite your dog's interest, and enhance their playful spirit.

programme.title: Live: Exposure for Dogs
programme.desc: Programs edited with limited exposure to sounds that help your dog get accustomed to things like car rides and doorbells.

programme.title: Live: Stimulation for Dogs
programme.desc: Engaging programs designed to stimulate dogs mentally, crafted to ignite your dog's interest, and enhance their playful spirit.

programme.title: Live: Stimulation for Dogs
programme.desc: Engaging programs designed to stimulate dogs mentally, crafted to ignite your dog's interest, and enhance their playful spirit.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lighthearted drama with the maverick antiques dealer. Lovejoy tricks Lady Jane into taking part in an illegal bidding ring at an auction - threatening their relationship.

programme.title: Waiting for God
programme.desc: More madness from those residents of Bayview retirement home. Tom and Diana plan to hijack a bus and help Sarah to have her baby, despite Diana's protestations.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Who's That with Barry and Glenda? - It's Not Barry and Glenda: Classic comedy. Truly reckons Barry is up to something sinister - why else would he be in the woods with a suitcase.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The long running sitcom that first graced our screens in 1973. Clegg, Truly and Alvin reluctantly agree to go to a remote farm and take some old-timers out for a day.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Barry Becomes a Psychopathic Killer but Only Part Time: Roy Clarke's classic sitcom. Truly helps Smiler when he's pursued by a woman who thinks he's rich.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown joins forces with Chief Inspector Valentine to uncover a dark secret at Helmsley House.

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Catherine works her final shift, when scores are settled for good, and grandson Ryan faces a moral dilemma.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Is time up for the veteran detectives in the hugely popular crime drama? A time capsule is dug up with a message from a murdered girl warning of nuclear war.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Emilia Fox stars in a compelling feature-length mystery. Leo, Nikki and Jack head for war-torn Afghanistan to investigate a soldier's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Haven
programme.desc: Duke is ejected from the barn and rescued by a young woman; Audrey is missing, and the Troubles are worse than ever.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Callaghan's daughter is in town visiting and after seeing her old graduation photo, Gerry wants to take her out on a date; Bobbi leads a photo shoot for Xavier's campaign.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry has a hard time accepting a former student as an adult; Robert tries too hard to connect with a student; Bobbi tries to prove her femininity to Malik.

programme.title: The Middle
programme.desc: Mike receives tickets to a basketball game that falls on the day of the funeral of Frankie's uncle; Brick tries to avoid a birthday party.

programme.title: The Middle
programme.desc: Mike and Frankie decide to cut unnecessary expenses, including their cable TV; Brick and his fellow socially challenged friends are forced to socialize during recess.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Angie's sister (guest star Jacqueline Obradors) makes a pass at George. Emiliano Diez also guest stars.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George has a crisis of conscience when he is asked to demote an employee because of his ethnic background.

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike and Molly are invited to her boss's Halloween party -- a holiday Mike hates.

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Carl meets an attractive woman (Holly Robinson Peete) at the diner and tries to score a date with her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: When Lindsey asks Alan to move in with her, Charlie will do anything to get him to agree to it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After moving in with Lyndsey, Alan continues to have a rendezvous with Melissa at Charlie's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Eldridge move into Charlie's house after their home burns down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan pretends to be Charlie when he goes out on the town; Charlie sneaks off for cosmetic surgery.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew (Drew Carey) vows to kill Mimi (Kathy Kinney) after she tricks him into offending a company executive.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When a pothole causes problems, Drew urges citizens to vote for a proposition that will allow more money for street repair.

programme.title: Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck becomes Awesome's handler and shows him how to be a real spy; Morgan has to deal with Jeff and Lester's latest hijinks after getting promoted to assistant manager.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane works to solve the murder of a jogger; Jane tries to hide her pregnancy from her mother; Maura and Frankie face the aftermath of their kiss.

programme.title: etalk
programme.desc: Daily gossip and celebrity news from home and abroad; roving reporters and Hollywood correspondents provide must-have details on scoops.

programme.title: This Is Pop
programme.desc: With grunge on the rise, U.K. bands reimagine pop in their own playful images.

programme.title: Chronicle Mysteries
programme.desc: Podcaster Alex McPherson investigates what happened to Tara Thurman whose body surfaces two years after she went missing; now, Tara's husband, Mike, demands answers while insisting he is not a murderer.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: After Nolan and Talia lose control of a crime scene, they begin to debate whether people are fundamentally good or bad; Lucy worries Tim is enabling his wife's destructive behavior and not taking care of himself.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The rookies are temporarily paired with new training officers; when Nolan and Lopez track down an escaped criminal, they discover a little kindness goes a long way; Jackson is forced to face his fears when he is partnered with officer Bradford.

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.

programme.title: etalk
programme.desc: Daily gossip and celebrity news from home and abroad; roving reporters and Hollywood correspondents provide must-have details on scoops.

programme.title: TMZ
programme.desc: TMZ TV tracks down today's hottest stars with their cameras, whether they are hitting the clubs or the dry cleaners.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The rookies are temporarily paired with new training officers; when Nolan and Lopez track down an escaped criminal, they discover a little kindness goes a long way; Jackson is forced to face his fears when he is partnered with officer Bradford.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Jess' dad visits with his new girlfriend (Kaitlin Olson), who turns out to be Jess and Cece's high school rival; Schmidt gets the guys to help him at work by participating in a focus group.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie has a return engagement with Gail (Tricia Helfer), Chelsea's best friend; Alan has a surprising effect on a female patient.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake's new friend, Eldridge, is a bad influence; Alan likes Eldridge's attractive mother (Courtney Thorne-Smith).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan tries for an intimate night at a hotel with his new girlfriend; Charlie tries his own approach to get the "girlfriend experience.".

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan and Jake head out on a road trip; Charlie is shocked to find himself haunted by the ghosts of his ex-girlfriends.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After Charlie's license is suspended, Jake becomes his driver; Alan plans to go to Chelsea's birthday party.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake goes to live with Judith and Herb after learning that Alan has been dating Eldridge's mom; Charlie decides to cut back on his drinking.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: When Lindsey asks Alan to move in with her, Charlie will do anything to get him to agree to it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After moving in with Lyndsey, Alan continues to have a rendezvous with Melissa at Charlie's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Eldridge move into Charlie's house after their home burns down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan pretends to be Charlie when he goes out on the town; Charlie sneaks off for cosmetic surgery.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie has difficulty dealing with dating a slightly older woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's girlfriend gets fed up with his stalker, Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan try to set Evelyn up with the pharmacist, Russell.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie falls for the woman who replaces Berta on her days off; Alan thinks Lyndsey's ex-husband is stalking him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie goes on a spending spree for old fling Courtney when she shows up after being in prison for three years.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Ashamed that he can't afford to buy a birthday present for Lyndsey, Alan gets creative.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Depressed after his breakup from Courtney (Jenny McCarthy), Charlie goes to see his psychiatrist (Jane Lynch).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan feels paranoid when Lyndsey becomes friendly with Charlie.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cam settle on their new normal, and Phil and Claire decide that one of the kids needs to move out so they can take control of the house again.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob (guest star Kelsey Grammer) is once again released from prison, into the care of his respectable brother Cecil (David Hyde Pierce).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa starts a new career as a babysitter. All is going well, until Marge and Homer employ her to look after Bart and Maggie..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When alcohol is banned in Springfield, Moe's Tavern becomes a speakeasy and Homer re-invents himself as the Beer Baron.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner and Mrs Krabappel embark on a torrid affair but have to bribe Bart to keep the whole thing a secret.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Mr Burns is reported dead, all the media outlets say what they really think of him. But the announcement is premature, and Mr Burns takes revenge..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Bart take part in a father-son therapy exercise on a ship. While they're away, Marge gets involved in Homer's fantasy football league.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Life aboard the St David isn't getting any easier. The chef's misplaced his sea legs, and the deck team is in disarray thanks to some dodgy leadership.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Hugh Grant and Julia Roberts star in the BAFTA-winning comedy romance about a bookshop owner who manages to get a glamorous movie star to go out with him. With Rhys Ifans.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Committed couples explore whether open relationships can strengthen their bonds. Can Jonny and Sarah overcome their nerves? And will Tanith and Paul partake.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Monday morning at the Douglas house features Chip's lost arrowheads, Robbie's missing trumpet and Steve's lost plans.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve's father-in-law makes it difficult for Steve (Fred MacMurray) to teach his sons that violence isn't right.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora plants seeds of doubt in Darrin's mind in her latest effort to break up his marriage.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The neighborhood is outraged at the lack of traffic signals at a nearby intersection.

programme.title: Here Come the Brides
programme.desc: A desperate moonshiner (John Anderson) on the run descends on Lottie and Jeremy as they are traveling to an Indian mission.

programme.title: The Rookies
programme.desc: The rookies go undercover to investigate a syndicate-backed film company that is responsible for the deaths of some of its actors.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: After an amnesiac woman is cleared of killing her husband, her son faces charges of embezzlement and murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A Frenchman is accused of killing the husband of a woman he hopes to marry; guests Jackie Coogan, David McCallum.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise plots with the neighbors to get George's mind off his work.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A young woman claims Louise is her mother.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A brilliant scientist is charged with murdering his greedy wife; guest Mala Powers.

programme.title: Good Day Seattle at 8am
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Good Day Seattle at 9am
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup Live
programme.desc: Highlights and news stories of the day's action, including previews of upcoming matches.

programme.title: Live: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Australia faces Egypt in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. Egypt finished second in Group G after a 1-1 draw with Iran. Australia ranked second after playing to a 0-0 draw against Paraguay in their final Group D match.

programme.title: Futbol HQ
programme.desc: Go deep inside the world's biggest sporting spectacle, the FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup Stories
programme.desc: A series of TV films by FIFA, organizers of the World Cup.

programme.title: Live: FIFA World Cup Today
programme.desc: Hosts Rob Stone and Rebecca Lowe, with analysts like Zlatan Ibrahimović, Thierry Henry, and Alexi Lalas, offer match insights and analysis.

programme.title: Live: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina faces Cabo Verde in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. Cabo Verde finished second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia. Argentina ranked first following a 3-1 win over Jordan in their final Group J match.

programme.title: Live: FIFA World Cup Today
programme.desc: Hosts Rob Stone and Rebecca Lowe, with analysts like Zlatan Ibrahimović, Thierry Henry, and Alexi Lalas, offer match insights and analysis.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Actress Tamera Mowry-Housley ("Baked With Love: Holiday"); singer-songwriter Raye chats and performs.

programme.title: The Noon
programme.desc: Midday news update.

programme.desc: Highlights and news stories of the day's action, including previews of upcoming matches.

programme.desc: Australia faces Egypt in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. Egypt finished second in Group G after a 1-1 draw with Iran. Australia ranked second after playing to a 0-0 draw against Paraguay in their final Group D match.

programme.desc: Live news and weather from the FOX 5 team.

programme.desc: Hosts Rob Stone and Rebecca Lowe, with analysts like Zlatan Ibrahimović, Thierry Henry, and Alexi Lalas, offer match insights and analysis.

programme.title: Live: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina faces Cabo Verde in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. Cabo Verde finished second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia. Argentina ranked first following a 3-1 win over Jordan in their final Group J match.
